title: Transient transfection of unicellular relative to animals Corallochytrium limacisporum with electroporation using Neon SystemVersion 1
steps: Neon system only allows 10 uL final volume in the tip-- adjust your cell and DNA dilutions accordingly for a final volume 10 uL
Settings: Apply twice in the same tip: 2000V 20ms 2pulses
Medium of Corallochytrium is Marine Broth, each well: 500 uL medium
Efficiency varies from 1 to 20 transformants per 1-5x10 5 cells
creator: Maria Rubio-Brotons
